endpoints.description: 3DM article detail HTML. browser_api_call compacts ordinary HTML into title, pubTime, source, text, and important links. Use this for patch说明 pages to extract version, date, update points, and related resource/download links without navigating the page.
strategy_notes: Use the compacted article detail as the primary evidence for patch version/date/summary and only navigate if related links are missing.

endpoints.description: 3DM Mod search/list API. Use JSON body {"search":"<game or mod keyword>","page":1,"limit":50,"order":2} to get mod candidates with game name, title, update time, and download counts.
strategy_notes: Use the search field, not keyword, for the query string; order=2 returns download/popularity-oriented ordering.
Filter candidates by game_name when the task names a specific game, then call /api/mods/{id} only for the top needed candidates.

runtime_strategies.name: three_dm_mod_search_detail_budget
runtime_strategies.trigger: 3DM Mod tasks asking for top mods, download counts, update times, or downloadable resources.

actions.description: Call the mod list API with the task's game/mod keyword, then filter compact rows by gameName/title.
Fetch detail only for top selected candidates to expose resources and version fields.

observable_validation: Compact search rows include ids plus gameName/title matching the requested game or mod keyword.
Detail rows include resources or explicit missing resource fields before final answer.
notes: Do not open every mod detail page in the browser; use the compact API rows and capped detail fan-out.

endpoints.description: 3DM Mod detail API. Returns title, game, version, download count, update time, description/content, and resource download entries.
strategy_notes: Use this after search/list candidate selection, not as an unbounded fan-out.
Answer missing download/resource fields explicitly if the detail API omits them.
